pluses: Fleet-footed and lash-driven — quick afoot (base Snaga)
Beneath notice — the overlooked slip past unseen
Foul blades — crude weapons smeared with filth (30% chance to Poison the struck foe)
Long-armed — reaches and places a little farther than most (base Snaga)
Children of the Dark — by night and in the deep places, a heavier blow (+30% melee damage, stacks with Strength)
Iron-gutted — devours foul carrion (rotten flesh) without sickening
minuses: Least and weakest of the Orc-kind — only 6 hearts, frailest of all the kindreds (base Snaga)
Feeble arm — strikes for less even at rest (−20%, base Snaga)
Dread of the Sun — under open daylight strikes for far less (a further −40%) and is badly slowed (Slowness II)
Tires without rest — wearies after long without sleep
